# Frozen self-host bootstrap ELF (A6/RI-E1): the checked-in pure-MIND stage0
# compiler that reproduces itself byte-identically (stage1==stage2==stage3)
# and seeds the PRIMARY reproduction-independence loop. Regenerate via
# self_host_loop_smoke.py --reseed with MINDC_SO set. NOT skippable in CI.
# name	size_bytes	sha256
stage1.elf	1834754	63b34e5b2176a54ff8aa921d6d7787f7bc6010c6d17c35785596b6d5fc3c70d6
